name: Week 5 - Recovery.2 - Free Ride
note: Just ENJOY today. You have two options. Either just ride around the amazing Worlds on Zwift or join in a Zwift group ride of some description. The goal is to aim for 45min of endurance riding. Ride on feel today at a 3-5/10 perceived exertion level (RPE). (by Shayne Gaffney)
